# jamfschool_device_group (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School device group by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_device_group" "example" {
  id = 789
}

output "device_group_name" {
  value = data.jamfschool_device_group.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier of the device group.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `information` (String) Information text for the group.
- `is_smart_group` (Boolean) Whether this is a smart group.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID.
- `members` (Number) Number of members.
- `name` (String) Name.
- `shared` (Boolean) Whether the group is shared.
